title: GDYUKV — Family-rescue jingle ("good yuk", Robotron)
tldr: GWAVE preset using `YUKSND` — the longer cousin of STRT. Plays when the player rescues an entire family of humans.
how: Similar to STRT but with different initial parameters (longer duration, possibly higher pitch). The `YUKSND` pattern provides the rising motif; GWAVE renders it through the standard wavetable engine.
watch: Compare against STRT in the A/B diff — both use YUKSND but the surrounding preset bytes differ.
see: **STRT** ($23) — shorter sibling using the same YUKSND pattern.
